title: Da Lat、Lam Dong — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Da Lat、Lam Dong的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Da Lat是Lam Dong的一個城市，人口約400,000。Vietnam’s hill station escape, known for its cool year-round climate, French colonial villas, flower gardens, and a romantic atmosphere that draws both tourists and expats.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
